name: mostGenerateLockError
title: mostGenerateLockError
syntax: long mostGenerateLockError(long channel, long unmodtime, long modtime, long repeat);
description: Starts (repeat > 0) or stops (repeat = 0) generation of Light Unmodulated-Modulated transitions.
For OptoLyzerOL3150o: The stress network interface controller (NIC) must have its bypass opened (see mostSetStressNodeParameter).

parameters.name: unmodtime
parameters.description: Time during which unmodulated light is emitted (in ms).

parameters.name: modtime
parameters.description: Time during which modulated light is emitted (in ms).
Stops the generation of Unmodulated-Modulated transitions

availability: MOST25 MOST50 MOST150 After measurement start Not in Stopmeasurement
MOST25 MOST50 MOST150 After measurement start Not in Stopmeasurement
